questions.question: Why was gold used in Rutherford’s experiment?

answers.b: Gold can be hammered into very thin sheets

questions.question: The large deflection of some alpha particles indicates the

answers.a: presence of a dense and positively charged nucleus
answers.c: presence of a dense and negatively charged electron cluster
answers.d: presence of neutrons in the atom

questions.question: Which of the following was NOT a conclusion of Rutherford’s gold foil experiment?

answers.a: The nucleus is dense and positively charged
answers.b: The nucleus consists of proton and neutron
answers.d: The nucleus contains most of the atom's mass

questions.question: An alpha particle deflected back toward the source implies that the alpha particle

answers.c: passes through a dense region of negative charge

questions.question: Rutherford’s experiment can be performed with

answers.a: thin silver foil in static condition
answers.b: thick platinum foil in static condition
